Step: Tap the search bar or "Enter Destination" button on the Navigation screen
Expected Result: A text input field or address search screen appears with a keyboard

Step: Type "1000 Main Street" into the search field using keyboard input
Expected Result: The text "1000 Main Street" is entered in the search field

Step: Tap the "Search" button or press Enter to submit the search
Expected Result: Search results are displayed showing matching addresses

Step: Tap the first search result from the list
Expected Result: The selected destination is shown on the map with an address confirmation dialog

Step: Tap "Start" or "Go" to begin route guidance
Expected Result: Route guidance starts; the map displays a calculated route with turn-by-turn directions

Step: Verify the route is displayed on the map as a highlighted path
Expected Result: A visible route line is drawn from current location to the destination

Step: Verify turn-by-turn instructions are shown (e.g. next turn direction and distance)
Expected Result: A guidance banner or panel shows the next maneuver with distance

Step: Tap "Cancel Route" or "Stop" to end route guidance
Expected Result: Route guidance ends; the map returns to a free-browse state without an active route
